name: litlabs-web
description: LitreeLabs - AI-Powered Beauty Business Automation Platform with Multi-Provider Authentication

scripts.build: npm run build:hosting && npm run build:functions
scripts.build:functions: cd functions && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run build:functions && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build:hosting && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.reinstall: npm run clean && npm install && cd functions && npm install && cd ..

author: LiTree Labs
